text: types of data from Apple Health: Activity metrics: Steps, distance, flights climbed, active calories, exercise minutes, move and stand hours. Activity metrics: Steps, distance, flights climbed, active calories, exercise minutes, move and stand hours. Workouts: Type (running, cycling, strength, yoga, etc.), duration, distance, heart rate data, and calories burned. Workouts: Type (running, cycling, strength, yoga, etc.), duration, distance, heart rate data, and calories burned. Vitals: Heart rate, resting heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), blood pressure, respiratory rate, and blood oxygen. Vitals: Heart rate, resting heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), blood pressure, respiratory rate, and blood oxygen. Body measurements: Weight, height, body mass index, and body fat percentage. Body measurements: Weight, height, body mass index, and body fat percentage. Sleep: Total sleep time, sleep stages, time in bed, and sleep efficiency. Sleep: Total sleep time, sleep stages, time in bed, and sleep efficiency. Nutrition: Calories consumed, macronutrients, water intake, and micronutrients (if tracked). Nutrition: Calories consumed, macronutrients, water intake, and micronutrients (if tracked). Note: Our memory feature is designed to prevent Claude from using sensitive health information in future conversations. How to use health features Ask Claude a question about your health or fitness data (for example: "How have my runs been trending this month?" or "Show me my sleep patterns over the past two weeks"). Ask Claude a question about your health or fitness data (for example: "How have my runs been trending this month?" or "Show me my sleep patterns over the past two weeks"). Claude will request access to your health data if not already granted. Claude will request access to your health data if not already granted. Review the permission prompt and select your preferred option. Review the permission prompt and select your preferred option. Claude analyzes your data and provides insights, often with visual charts to help you understand trends. Claude analyzes your data and provides insights, often with visual charts to help you understand trends. Example prompts "Help me create a training plan for my upcoming half-marathon based on my recent running data."
